description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:latest Docker image with a cache on node_modules and three stages: install, test, and deploy. In the install stage add an Install Modules job that runs `npm i`. In the test stage add a Run ESLint job that runs `npm i` then `npx eslint loadlify.js`, and a Run npm test job that runs `npm i`, `export PATH=node_modules/.bin:$PATH`, and `npm test`. In the deploy stage add a Deploy to NPM job that runs only on tags, executes `npm i`, `export PATH=node_modules/.bin:$PATH`, `npm run build`, writes the NPM authentication token from the NPM_TOKEN variable to .npmrc, and runs `npm publish` to publish the package to the npm registry.
